title: Disaster Related Clothing/Emergency Supplies - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Disaster Related Clothing/Emergency Supplies 8 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF GLIDE REVITALIZATION MARCH 2025 FLOOD RECOVERY SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides long-term recovery assistance for Douglas County residents impacted by the March 2025 flooding. Assistance may include support with housing, home rehabilitation, debris clean up, emergency food, clothing and home furnishings, and mental health services. May be able to refer to home safety inspectors and well water testing assistance. 301 Glide Loop Drive Glide, OR 97443 Eligibility: Residents impacted by the March 2025 flooding Hours: Monday-Thursday WASHINGTON WILDFIRE INFORMATION OREGON WILDFIRE RESPONSE AND RECOVERY WEBSITE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about current wildfires and air quality. Offers a resource directory for wildfire preparation, response, and recovery. Includes evacuation information and a sign-up for emergency alerts through OR-Alert. Provides a list of verified organizations collecting donations for people impacted by wildfire.
